name: Sour Cherry Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the cherries and remove stems and pits.
2. Chop the cherries finely in a food processor or blender.
3. Measure the chopped fruit into a large saucepan.
4. Add sugar to the saucepan and stir well.
5. Place over high heat; bring to a full rolling boil.
6. Boil hard for 1 minute.
7. Remove from heat; stir in pectin.
8. Skim off foam with a metal spoon.
9. Continue stirring and skim for 5 minutes.
10. Add almond extract, if using.
11. Ladle into hot, sterilized jars, leaving 1/4 inch headspace.
12. Wipe rims and seal lids.
13. Process in a boiling water bath for 5 minutes.
Makes 4 to 5 pints.
